---
title: "Lorenzo Fabbri"
lang: en
cv-tagline: "Quantitative Scientist · Causal Inference & Applied Epidemiology"
cv-email: "lorenzo.fabbri92sm@gmail.com"
cv-location: "Madrid, Spain"
cv-website: "lorenzofabbri.github.io/epilorenzo"
cv-orcid: "0000-0003-3031-322X"
cv-scholar: "QbPv1H0AAAAJ"
cv-github: "lorenzoFabbri"
cv-linkedin: "lorenzo-fabbri-303185383"
cv-bluesky: "epilorenzo.bsky.social"
---

{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_summary.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_skills-industry.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_software.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_appointments.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_education-short.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_publications-selected.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_honors.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_continuing-education.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
